name: Live Control-Flow Wiring Lab
description: Step three probe inputs through a transient debugger, then physically wire the exact directed control-flow graph.
natural_language: Run all three probes through the debugger one step at a time. Then drag every labeled output wire to the correct node input and validate the harness.

metadata.notes: A six-node branching program exposes opaque dispatch ports. Three physical debugger traces reveal transient destinations before the operator drags and validates a replay-graded directed harness.
